why_it_matters: A reported food insecurity directly contradicts the note's 'no unmet needs/denies material hardship' conclusion and warrants resource referral.
Documenting the AUDIT-C score and low-risk alcohol intake completes the substance use assessment referenced in the plan.
At a 47-year-old woman's preventive visit, cancer screening status (breast, cervical, colon) is central to preventive care and affects management.
